utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ? No ! No , I am not stopping . I am Red Ross !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Dude , if you go back out there , you are gonna be Dead Ross !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am not stopping . I am Red Ross !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I do not care ! I am not quitting ! I insist on finishing this game !

emotion_cause.span: 2_if you go back out there , you are gonna be Dead Ross !

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: All right , all right , if you insist on doing this , at least let me help you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , God no ! That is no place for a woman . Those guys will grab anything .

emotion_cause.span: 5_That is no place for a woman . Those guys will grab anything .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: No . That is not what I am saying . I just may know a few things that might help you inflict some pain .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I like that .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Yeah ? Listen closely , Devon has got a weak ankle .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Huh ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: One swift kick and he will back off .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All right , bad ankle , got it !

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: And that big bloke with the beard , he has got a trick hip .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: And uh , and David over there , I heard he does not wear a cup .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I heard he does not wear a cup .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah ? I can use that , trick hip , no cup , okay ! Okay !

emotion_cause.span: 15_I can use that , trick hip , no cup

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: And uh , Liam , Liam got bad knees . You hit him right and he will go down like a lamp .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But ... but , Liam on my team .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I do not care ! You just get him !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am gonna go get him ! Okay , I am going back in !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: The Red Ross ! Okay .
